zh.Bearsted, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特比阿斯特德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Betts於1550年出生在英國肯特比阿斯特德時，他的父親Robert Betts42歲，母親Mrs Robert Betts26歲。他於1575年2月9日與Joan Larkyn在英國肯特明日香結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1594年11月25日在英國英格蘭肯特韋斯特 比可哈姆享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特韋斯特 比可哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander Betts于1550年出生在英国肯特比阿斯特德时，他的父亲Robert Betts42岁，母亲Mrs Robert Betts26岁。他于1575年2月9日与Joan Larkyn在英国肯特明日香结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1594年11月25日在英国英格兰肯特韋斯特 比可哈姆享年44岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特韋斯特 比可哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Betts
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Bett , with excrescent -s, a patronymic or metronymic from the medieval personal name Bett, a short form of Bartholomew, Beatrice, or Elizabeth.

variants.name: Bettis
meanings: English: variant of Betts (see also Bett ), or possibly a topographic name meaning ‘(dweller) by the hollows’, from Old English bytt ‘butt, cask, flagon, womb’, used topographically like Old English byden ‘butt’ (compare Bidwell ).

variants.name: Bett
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): from the Middle English personal name Bett(e). When feminine it was usually a pet form of Beatrice but possibly also Elizabeth. When masculine it was a pet form of Bertram or Bertelmew (see Bartholomew ).

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Betts was born in 1550, in Bearsted, Kent, England, his father, Robert Betts, was 42 and his mother, Mrs Robert Betts, was 26. He married Joan Larkyn on 9 February 1575, in Langley, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 25 November 1594, in West Peckham, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44, and was buried in West Peckham, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Betts est né en 1550, à Bearsted, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Robert Betts, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Mrs Robert Betts, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Joan Larkyn le 9 février 1575, à Langley, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 25 novembre 1594, à West Peckham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à West Peckham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Betts 1550 in Bearsted, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Betts 42 und seine Mutter Mrs Robert Betts 26. Er hat am 9. Februar 1575 in Langley, Kent, England Joan Larkyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 25. November 1594 im Alter von 44 Jahren in West Peckham, Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in West Peckham, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Bettsが1550年にイギリスケントビールステドで生まれた時，父Robert Bettsは42歳，母Mrs Robert Bettsは26歳であった。1575年2月9日にイギリスケントラングリーでJoan Larkynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1594年11月25日にイギリスイギリスケントウエスト ペックハムで44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントウエスト ペックハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Betts(이)가 1550년 영국 켄트 브이르스테드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Betts(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Robert Betts(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1575년 2월 9일 영국 켄트 랭글리에서 Joan Larkyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1594년 11월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 웨스트 펙함에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 웨스트 펙함에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Betts родился в 1550 г. в местности бирстед, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Betts было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs Robert Betts, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Larkyn 9 февраля 1575 г. в местности лангли, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 25 ноября 1594 г. в местности вест пеккхам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности вест пеккхам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.
